fields.description:
## What
Document in the README that the on-disk ticket store (the `tickets` orphan branch / `.tickets-tracker/`) is **not** intended to be human-readable: events are append-only files, not stored in order, and require the reducer to compute current state. Direct readers should use `rebar` commands. Add a synthetic, illustrative sample event-log JSONL and link it from the README.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] README has a section explaining the store is machine-format / not human-readable, ordering is by HLC filename + reducer-computed, view via rebar commands.
- [ ] A sample event-log JSONL committed under docs/ and linked from the README.
- [ ] Sample is synthetic, faithful to the real event body schema, and demonstrates core features (create/claim/comment/link/tag/transition/sign) clearly and amusingly.
- [ ] Follow-up plan proposed for making the worktree symlink dir + tickets branch name configurable.
